summary: Completed comprehensive testing of risky stocks filtering feature and 1000+ stock universe expansion. All 19 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/paper/risky-stocks returns 83 blocked stocks
Backend: Risky stocks list contains meme stocks (GME, AMC, BBBY, BB, CLOV)
Backend: Risky stocks list contains leveraged ETFs (TQQQ, SQQQ, SPXL, SPXS, SOXL, SOXS, UVXY)
Backend: /api/paper/check-symbol/GME returns is_risky=true, can_auto_trade=false
Backend: /api/paper/check-symbol/AMC returns is_risky=true
Backend: /api/paper/check-symbol/TQQQ returns is_risky=true
Backend: /api/paper/check-symbol/AAPL returns is_risky=false, can_auto_trade=true
Backend: /api/paper/check-symbol/MSFT returns is_risky=false
Backend: Symbol check is case-insensitive (gme -> GME)
Backend: Crypto-related stocks (MSTR, RIOT, MARA, COIN) are risky
Backend: EV SPACs (LCID, RIVN, NKLA) are risky
Backend: /api/investments/browse returns 1097 stocks (exceeds 700+ target)
Backend: /api/investments/scan returns all categories (Hot, Bullish, Undervalued, Watch, Bearish)
Backend: /api/paper/settings returns settings
Backend: /api/paper/queue returns trade queue
Backend: /api/paper/stats returns statistics
Backend: /api/watchlist returns watchlist items
Backend: Watchlist add/remove endpoints accessible
Backend: /api/trading/scan returns signals with news sentiment fields
Frontend: Dashboard loads with Hot Trading Signals and Top Investment Ideas
Frontend: Auto Trade page shows '83 high-risk stocks blocked' indicator
Frontend: Quick Trade form shows 'High-Risk Stock Detected' warning for GME
Frontend: Warning message: 'GME is a meme/leveraged/speculative stock. Trades will be blocked by safety controls.'
Frontend: Button changes to 'Queue (Will Block)' for risky stocks
Frontend: Investment Ideas page shows '1097 stocks analyzed'
Frontend: Investment categories populated (Hot:15, Bullish:15, Undervalued:15, Watch:15, Bearish:30)
Frontend: Trading page shows Top Trades Today with news sentiment badges
Frontend: News sentiment badge displays 'News: Slightly Positive (+4)' on XOM
Frontend: Recent News headlines appear under trading signals
Frontend: Signal Quality Diagnostics panel visible
Frontend: Watchlist page shows 5 stocks (TSLA, NVDA, MSFT, AAPL, GOOGL)
critical_code_review_comments: RISKY_STOCKS set contains 83 high-risk symbols including meme stocks, leveraged ETFs, SPACs, crypto-related, and EV SPACs
check_risk_controls method correctly blocks risky stocks as FIRST CHECK before other validations
/api/paper/risky-stocks endpoint returns full list with count and reason
/api/paper/check-symbol/{symbol} endpoint provides individual stock risk check
Auto Trade UI correctly displays risky stock count and warning messages
Investment universe expanded to 1097 stocks (exceeds 700+ target)
seed_data_creation: Existing watchlist items: TSLA, NVDA, MSFT, AAPL, GOOGL
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Risky stocks filtering - 83 high-risk stocks (meme stocks, leveraged ETFs, SPACs, crypto-related) are blocked from auto-trading. GME, AMC, TQQQ return is_risky=true, can_auto_trade=false. AAPL, MSFT return is_risky=false, can_auto_trade=true. 2) Auto Trade page shows '83 high-risk stocks blocked' and displays warning when entering risky stock symbol. 3) Investment Ideas page shows 1097 stocks analyzed (exceeds 700+ target). 4) Trading page shows news sentiment badges on signals. 5) Watchlist functionality works correctly with 5 stocks.

categories: Meme stocks (GME, AMC, BBBY, BB, CLOV, WISH, WKHS, SPCE, HYMC, MULN)
Cannabis stocks (TLRY, SNDL, CGC, ACB, CRON, HEXO, OGI, VFF)
Crypto-related (MSTR, RIOT, MARA, BITF, CLSK, BTBT, HIVE, HUT, COIN)
SPACs (DWAC, PHUN, BKKT, IRNT, TMC, DNA)
Leveraged ETFs (TQQQ, SQQQ, SPXL, SPXS, UPRO, UVXY, SOXL, SOXS, LABU, LABD, etc.)
Penny stocks/biotech (ATOS, SESN, CRVS, OCGN, INO, SRNE, NRXP, VXRT)
EV SPACs (LCID, RIVN, FSR, ARVL, GOEV, RIDE, NKLA, HYLN)
Other high-risk (WISH, OPEN, HOOD, UPST, AFRM)

ui_integration.header: Shows '83 high-risk stocks blocked' in Queue New Trade section
ui_integration.warning: Red warning box with 'High-Risk Stock Detected' message
ui_integration.button: Changes to 'Queue (Will Block)' for risky stocks

news_sentiment_integration.trading_signals: Shows news sentiment badges (e.g., 'News: Slightly Positive (+4)')
